creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
This patch makes the following changes:

-Updates gemrb to the latest version (in Makefile)
-Makes according changes to distinfo
-Makes according changes to pkg-plist
-patch for files/ path (patches 3 files in this path) to allow NOPORTDOCS option for this 0.6.0

Fix: The included patches

--- distinfo.orig	2009-07-14 03:31:36.000000000 -0700
+++ distinfo	2009-12-29 21:39:33.000000000 -0800
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (gemrb-0.5.0.tar.gz) = 6b371992c1971d2cbefd06233f1edd51
-SHA256 (gemrb-0.5.0.tar.gz) = 795c7ce85ceed60f4f81a451f06969a12d6d812d71e10d85786ef64454f14de1
-SIZE (gemrb-0.5.0.tar.gz) = 2084847
+MD5 (gemrb-0.6.0.tar.gz) = 797df7e3abf4b9a051572e83f3d70380
+SHA256 (gemrb-0.6.0.tar.gz) = 64f8b5c08e7228ab6f6665abfb0ac5df6f69c701c74cf301b892c504efc7fa29
+SIZE (gemrb-0.6.0.tar.gz) = 2227197
--- distinfo.diff ends here ---
How-To-Repeat:     Apply the patches
